entities.name: System
entities.description: Core software system owned by the organization

entities.name: External Security Service
entities.description: Third-party security service for authentication and authorization

entities.name: External Cost Optimization Service
entities.description: Third-party service for cost efficiency and performance optimization

entities.name: User
entities.description: Human actor interacting with the system

entities.name: Web Application
entities.description: Deployable web application container serving user requests

entities.name: Database
entities.description: Deployable database container for persistent storage

entities.name: Authentication Module
entities.description: Handles user authentication and authorization

entities.name: Data Processing Module
entities.description: Optimizes cost and performance of operations (Supports R6: The system should optimize resource allocation to reduce operational costs without compromising service quality.)

entities.name: Storage Adapter
entities.description: Manages cost-efficient data storage and retrieval (Supports R11: Backup and recovery procedures must be robust to prevent data loss and ensure system reliability in case of failures.)

entities.name: API Gateway
entities.description: API gateway container handling routing and security

entities.name: System
entities.description: The software system owned by the organization that must satisfy security, cost efficiency, performance efficiency, reliability, and compatibility requirements.

entities.name: Public User
entities.description: A member of the public who accesses the system during high-demand periods such as public events or emergencies

entities.name: High-Demand System
entities.description: System that provides information to the public during high-demand periods such as public events or emergencies

entities.name: Load Balancer
entities.description: Distributes incoming traffic across container instances to maintain performance and reliability during high-demand periods

entities.name: Web Server Container
entities.description: Serves web content and handles user requests during high-demand periods

entities.name: Request Routing Component
entities.description: Routes incoming requests to appropriate backend services based on load and availability

entities.name: Health Check Component
entities.description: Monitors container health and triggers failover or scaling actions to maintain reliability

entities.name: Scaling Controller Component
entities.description: Controls the auto-scaling policy and triggers scaling events based on metrics

entities.name: Content Delivery Network
entities.description: External CDN service to distribute content efficiently during high-demand periods

entities.name: Caching Service
entities.description: Caches frequently accessed information to reduce load during high-demand periods

entities.name: Police Officer
entities.description: A human actor who reports their status (available, busy, on break) to the system.

entities.name: Police System
entities.description: The software system that police officers access, requiring security measures on unsecured networks

entities.name: Secure Access Gateway
entities.description: Container that enforces security controls when officers connect from public or unsecured networks

entities.name: Status Reporting System
entities.description: System that allows officers to report their status and accommodates fluctuating numbers of active officers and incidents. (Supports R4: Officers shall be able to receive and acknowledge dispatch orders through the system.) (Supports R7: The system shall enable officers to record audio statements and take notes within the incident report feature.) (Supports R8: The system shall provide a map interface displaying the locations of incidents and dispatched officers.) (Supports R12: Officers can directly attach photos and videos to their incident reports through the system interface.) (Supports R15: The system shall maintain a log of all dispatch communications and actions taken by officers for accountability and review.) (Supports R16: Officers shall be able to access a database of local laws and regulations through the system for reference during patrols.) (Supports R18: The system must process and analyze incident data efficiently to provide timely and relevant information to officers in the field.) (Supports R20: Officers should be able to customize their dashboard to access the most relevant information quickly.) (Supports R26: The system shall generate and send automated alerts to officers based on specific criteria such as incident proximity or expertise required.) (Supports R27: The system must provide officers with clear, actionable notifications and alerts during critical situations.) (Supports R28: The system shall provide officers access to historical data and analytics on past incidents and outcomes for informed decision-making.)

entities.name: Status Reporting API
entities.description: Container handling officer status reporting (available, busy, on break)

entities.name: Load Manager
entities.description: Container that dynamically scales to accommodate fluctuating numbers of active officers and incidents

entities.name: Status API Container
entities.description: Deployable API container handling officer status reporting and incident load management.

entities.name: Billing System
entities.description: Handles billing operations with cost efficiency and performance efficiency considerations, especially in areas with higher charges

entities.name: Customer
entities.description: End user who receives billing statements and interacts with the billing system

Views and pays bills
